title: Empire State of Mind

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models current earnings from large-scale streaming, New York anthem replay value, and ongoing playlist and cultural reuse.

ownership.master_owner: Primarily label-controlled masters with meaningful artist-side royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears split among writers and publishers
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog sale adjustment is applied here
ownership.notes: This is a modeled revenue split, not a published royalty statement.

meaning_summary: This track pairs a memorable hook with strong cultural recall, which helps explain its staying power and long-tail commercial value.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming remains the main long-tail driver for recognizable rap tracks.
Playlist placement and cultural recall help the song stay active.
Sampling, sync use, and short-form rediscovery can extend earnings.
